tips.text: Choose healthy and active animals
Book your animal early
Verify seller authenticity
Check weight and age properly
Inspect the animal physically if possible
Ensure proper vaccination and care
Confirm delivery details in advance
Use secure and trusted payment methods
Keep all booking and payment records
Follow proper Qurbani guidelines and intention
Do not buy sick or weak animals
Avoid last-minute booking rush
Do not trust unverified sellers
Avoid unsafe or unknown payment methods
Do not ignore animal health conditions
Avoid overpaying without price comparison
Do not skip checking delivery confirmation
Avoid incomplete or unclear booking details
Do not rely on fake images or misleading ads
Avoid rushing the Qurbani process without preparation
